violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Spinach and cheese baked pocket was observed held at 127 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item was out of adequate temperature control for less than four hours and did not need to be disposed (PIC given option to re-heat). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
